content:
interaction_id,date,channel,customer_segment,subject,description,resolved
INT-1001,2026-07-08,phone,retail,Account access locked after travel,Customer reported account lockout following international travel; requested manual unlock following our standard verification protocol.,yes
INT-1002,2026-07-12,email,retail,Disputed transaction,Customer disputes a $342 transaction at an online merchant; suspects unauthorized use; wants chargeback initiated.,no
INT-1003,2026-07-15,phone,smb,Wire transfer hold question,Small business customer asking why outgoing wire to international vendor was held for additional review; concerned about supplier payment deadlines.,yes
INT-1004,2026-07-19,email,retail,Statement clarification,Customer asks for clarification of a fee labelled 'maintenance adjustment' on monthly statement; requests fee waiver.,yes
INT-1005,2026-07-22,phone,wealth,Unauthorized access concern,Wealth management client reports receiving a security alert email they did not initiate; concerned about identity compromise.,no
INT-1006,2026-07-28,email,retail,Refund request,Customer requesting refund of overdraft fee following misunderstanding about pending deposit timing.,yes
INT-1007,2026-08-04,phone,smb,Loan modification ask,Small business asking about hardship modification options on outstanding term loan; cited reduced revenue.,no
INT-1008,2026-08-11,email,wealth,Address change request,Wealth client requesting change of mailing address following relocation; requested confirmation of process.,yes
